headline: Linden Lake Labs Applauds Acquisition of Portfolio Company CrossBridge Bio by Eli Lilly and Company
summary: ROCKVILLE, Md., April 14, 2026--Linden Lake Labs ("L3"), an early-stage life sciences platform committed to advancing innovative therapies, today announced that its portfolio company, CrossBridge Bio, has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company.

content.title: Linden Lake Labs Applauds Acquisition of Portfolio Company CrossBridge Bio by Eli Lilly and Company
content.summary: ROCKVILLE, Md., April 14, 2026--Linden Lake Labs ("L3"), an early-stage life sciences platform committed to advancing innovative therapies, today announced that its portfolio company, CrossBridge Bio, has entered into a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company.

headline: CrossBridge Bio Enters an Agreement to be Acquired by Eli Lilly to Advance Next-Generation Dual-Payload Antibody-Drug Conjugates
summary: HOUSTON, April 14, 2026--CrossBridge Bio, Inc., a pre-clinical biotechnology company pioneering the development of next-generation dual-payload antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) today announced a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly").

content.title: CrossBridge Bio Enters an Agreement to be Acquired by Eli Lilly to Advance Next-Generation Dual-Payload Antibody-Drug Conjugates
content.summary: HOUSTON, April 14, 2026--CrossBridge Bio, Inc., a pre-clinical biotechnology company pioneering the development of next-generation dual-payload antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) today announced a definitive agreement to be acquired by Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly").

headline: Vasa Therapeutics Partners with Lilly TuneLab to Power AI/ML-Driven CAMKII Inhibitor Platform
summary: Vasa Therapeutics ("Vasa"), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing transformative therapies for cardiovascular, neuromuscular, and age-related disorders, today announced an agreement with Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly") that enables the company to utilize Lilly TuneLab, an AI-enabled drug discovery platform that provides biotech companies access to drug discovery models trained on Lilly's proprietary data.

content.title: Vasa Therapeutics Partners with Lilly TuneLab to Power AI/ML-Driven CAMKII Inhibitor Platform
content.summary: Vasa Therapeutics ("Vasa"), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing transformative therapies for cardiovascular, neuromuscular, and age-related disorders, today announced an agreement with Eli Lilly and Company ("Lilly") that enables the company to utilize Lilly TuneLab, an AI-enabled drug discovery platform that provides biotech companies access to drug discovery models trained on Lilly's proprietary data.

thumbnail.caption: Vasa is a privately held biopharmaceutical company developing therapeutics that target pathophysiology of cardiovascular aging. For more information, visit vasatherapeutics.com. (PRNewsfoto/Vasa Therapeutics)

headline: Novo Nordisk Stock Rises. An OpenAI Partnership Can Help It Find the Next Ozempic.
summary: Novo Nordisk  stock was rising on Tuesday after the Ozempic and Wegovy maker unveiled a partnership with ChatGPT developer OpenAI that it said would speed up drug discovery.  Novo’s American depositary receipts climbed 2.9% to $39.09 ahead of the opening bell.  The ADRs were rising after Novo announced a strategic partnership with OpenAI.

content.title: Novo Nordisk Stock Rises. An OpenAI Partnership Can Help It Find the Next Ozempic.
content.summary: Novo Nordisk  stock was rising on Tuesday after the Ozempic and Wegovy maker unveiled a partnership with ChatGPT developer OpenAI that it said would speed up drug discovery.  Novo’s American depositary receipts climbed 2.9% to $39.09 ahead of the opening bell.  The ADRs were rising after Novo announced a strategic partnership with OpenAI.

headline: Lilly boosts ADC portfolio with CrossBridge Bio deal
summary: Worth up to $300 million, the buyout is Lilly’s latest of an ADC maker and adds technology for making “dual-payload” therapies.

content.title: Lilly boosts ADC portfolio with CrossBridge Bio deal
content.summary: Worth up to $300 million, the buyout is Lilly’s latest of an ADC maker and adds technology for making “dual-payload” therapies.

headline: Eli Lilly Broadens Oncology Portfolio As Investors Reassess Valuation Potential
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) agreed to acquire CrossBridge Bio, a pre clinical ADC company focused on dual payload TROP2 therapies, adding CBB-120 to its oncology pipeline with trials planned for 2026. The company reported positive Phase 3 topline results for Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) in relapsed or refractory chronic lymphocytic leukemia, with a statistically significant progression free survival benefit. Both developments expand Lilly’s presence in oncology beyond its diabetes and obesity drugs,...

content.title: Eli Lilly Broadens Oncology Portfolio As Investors Reassess Valuation Potential
content.summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) agreed to acquire CrossBridge Bio, a pre clinical ADC company focused on dual payload TROP2 therapies, adding CBB-120 to its oncology pipeline with trials planned for 2026. The company reported positive Phase 3 topline results for Jaypirca (pirtobrutinib) in relapsed or refractory chronic lymphocytic leukemia, with a statistically significant progression free survival benefit. Both developments expand Lilly’s presence in oncology beyond its diabetes and obesity drugs,...

headline: Acadia (ACHC) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: Christopher Hunter: Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining Acadia's Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Call.  Todd brings nearly a decade of public company CFO experience, most recently serving as CFO of Elanco Animal Health where he helped shape the company's strategic direction following its spinoff from Eli Lilly.  Prior to that, he served as CFO of Acadia Pharmaceuticals.

content.title: Acadia (ACHC) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
content.summary: Christopher Hunter: Good morning, everyone, and thank you for joining Acadia's Third Quarter 2025 Earnings Call.  Todd brings nearly a decade of public company CFO experience, most recently serving as CFO of Elanco Animal Health where he helped shape the company's strategic direction following its spinoff from Eli Lilly.  Prior to that, he served as CFO of Acadia Pharmaceuticals.
